name: HYDRA
description: 402-native paid work engine for agents and developers. Web extraction, search, format conversion, developer tools, web checks, public data, regulatory intelligence, prediction market signals, oracle data. 40 paid endpoints from $0.001 USDC via x402 on Base L2.

skills.name: Web Extraction
skills.description: Structured web extraction — title, headings, clean text, links, metadata from any URL. $0.01 USDC.

skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Web search with structured result extraction. $0.02 USDC.

skills.name: HTML to Markdown
skills.description: Convert HTML to clean Markdown preserving structure. $0.005 USDC.
examples: Convert this HTML page to Markdown

skills.name: URL Health Check
skills.description: Check URL status, redirects, response time. $0.005 USDC.

skills.name: DNS Lookup
skills.description: DNS record lookup — A, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME. $0.005 USDC.

skills.name: SSL Certificate Check
skills.description: SSL cert inspection — issuer, expiry, SANs. $0.005 USDC.

skills.name: Hash Text
skills.description: SHA-256, SHA-512, MD5, SHA-1 hash. $0.001 USDC.

skills.name: Text Diff
skills.description: Unified diff with stats and similarity ratio. $0.003 USDC.

skills.name: Wikipedia Summary
skills.description: Wikipedia article summary with thumbnail. $0.01 USDC.

skills.name: arXiv Search
skills.description: Academic paper search — titles, authors, abstracts, PDFs. $0.02 USDC.

skills.name: Regulatory Risk Scan
skills.description: Full regulatory risk scan with scored impact. $2.00 USDC.
examples: Scan my DeFi protocol for SEC/CFTC exposure

skills.name: Prediction Market Signals
skills.description: Scored regulatory signals for Polymarket/Kalshi. $5.00 USDC.
examples: Get signals for all regulatory prediction markets

skills.name: FOMC Pre-Decision Signal
skills.description: Pre-FOMC rate probabilities and speech analysis. $5.00 USDC.
examples: Rate probabilities for next FOMC meeting

skills.name: Token Price
skills.description: Current price, 24h change, market cap. $0.001 USDC.
